title: Truth Table Enhancement
summary: Make large truth tables manageable with compact/filter modes, row highlighting that pulses canvas input nodes, column sorting, binary-to-decimal tooltips, color-coded cells, sticky headers, a Focus Failed Rows button, auto-expand on simulation, and tappable rows for mobile live testing.

tasks.description: Add Compact Mode toggle for truth tables with 8+ rows — shows only failing rows when results are available. Add a toggle button above the table that switches between 'All Rows' and 'Failing Only'. When no results exist, show all rows.
acceptance_criteria: Toggle button appears above truth table when level has 8+ rows (4+ inputs)
When 'Failing Only' is active and results exist, only failed rows are shown
When no results or all pass, shows all rows regardless of toggle
Toggle state resets on level load

tasks.description: Add row highlighting: hover a truth table row → highlight the corresponding input combination on the canvas. Input nodes pulse with their values (green glow for 1, dim for 0). Use a CSS hover class and set gameState._highlightedInputRow.
acceptance_criteria: Hovering a truth table row highlights that row visually
Input nodes on canvas pulse to show the hovered row's input values
Pulse stops when mouse leaves the row
Works on both desktop hover and mobile tap

tasks.description: Add column sorting: click a column header to sort truth table by that column. Click again to reverse. Show a small sort indicator (▲/▼) on the active sort column. Default sort is by input combination (natural order).
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a column header sorts the truth table by that column
Clicking again reverses sort direction
Sort indicator arrow shown on active column
Sorting works with both input and output columns
Sort resets to natural order on level load

tasks.description: For 4-input levels (16 rows), default to a collapsed 'Show key rows' view showing first row, last row, and any failing rows. Add 'Show All ▼' / 'Show Key ▲' toggle. Key rows also include any row where output differs from previous row.
acceptance_criteria: 4-input levels default to collapsed view showing key rows
Key rows include: first, last, failing rows, and rows where output changes
Toggle button switches between key rows and all rows
All rows shown if there are results and simulation has been run

tasks.description: Add binary-to-decimal annotation: show the decimal value of each input combination in a subtle tooltip. Use a title attribute on input cells showing 'A=1,B=0 = 2 (decimal)'. Also add a small decimal column at the start.
acceptance_criteria: Each truth table row has a decimal index column (#) at the left showing the row number in decimal
Hovering input cells shows tooltip with decimal value
Decimal column is styled subtly (smaller, dimmer) to not distract

tasks.description: Color-code truth table cells: 0 = dim blue (#4466aa), 1 = bright green (#00ff00), matching wire signal colors. Apply to both input and output value cells.
acceptance_criteria: All 0 cells are rendered in dim blue
All 1 cells are rendered in bright green
Colors apply to inputs, expected outputs, and actual outputs
Colors work in both dark and light mode

tasks.description: Add 'Focus Failed Rows' button after a failed run — scrolls to and highlights failing rows with a pulse animation. Button appears below the result display when there are failures.
acceptance_criteria: Button appears after a failed simulation
Clicking scrolls the truth table to the first failing row
Failing rows get a brief pulse highlight animation
Button hidden when no results or all pass
Truth table auto-expands if collapsed when Focus is clicked

tasks.description: Add sticky headers for truth table so column labels stay visible when scrolling. Use position: sticky on the thead tr.
acceptance_criteria: Truth table column headers stick to top when scrolling
Sticky headers have a solid background (not transparent)
Works on both mobile and desktop

tasks.description: Ensure truth table auto-expands when running simulation (override manual collapse). If the user collapsed the truth table manually, expand it when RUN or Quick Test is pressed.
acceptance_criteria: Running simulation expands a collapsed truth table
The chevron indicator updates to show expanded state
Works for both RUN and Quick Test

tasks.description: Mobile: make truth table rows tappable — tapping sets input nodes to that row's values for live testing. On touch devices, tapping a truth table row sets the input node values and triggers live signal propagation.
acceptance_criteria: On touch devices, tapping a truth table row sets input node values to that row
Live signal propagation happens immediately after tap
Brief visual feedback on the tapped row
Works alongside existing hover highlighting

testing_focus: Truth table rendering with 2-input, 3-input, and 4-input levels
Column sorting behavior with results present and absent
Compact/key rows mode toggle in 4-input levels
Row hover highlighting syncing with canvas input nodes
Mobile tap behavior on truth table rows
Sticky headers on scrollable truth tables
Auto-expand on simulation for collapsed tables
Focus Failed Rows button appearance and scroll behavior
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced or truth table rendering breaks for existing levels, revert
